subject: Practical tips for your Doccle account
body:
###Care allowance coming soon┬а


The care allowance is sent out every year. With Doccle, you donтАЩt need to worry: as soon as the document is available, you can easily track and pay it from your account.┬а

Everything stays organised and simple. Make sure your account is connected to your health insurance provider in Doccle.


[ Go to your account](https://launch.doccle.be/connections "To your Doccle-account")


###E-invoicing with a lifetime discount┬а


Mandatory e-invoicing via Peppol is now in effect. Are self-employed or do you run a non-profit organization and are you not yet registered? Then you risk a тВм1,500 fine.┬а


[Set it up](http://launch.doccle.be/ui/peppol/register? "Register for Peppol") quickly, easily and cost-effectively via Doccle.┬а

Users who activate DocclePro to send invoices currently receive a lifetime discount.┬а


[ Activate now](https://launch.doccle.be/doccle-pro/subscribe?channel=newsletter "E-invoicing via Doccle")


###WorkID: 1 profile for multiple temp agencies


WorkID is a platform that simplifies both the search for a new job and the related administrative process, primarily for temporary workers, students, and flexi-job workers.┬а

Recently, WorkID introduced a convenient тАЬApply with WorkIDтАЭ feature, allowing you to apply with just one click at a growing number of recruitment agencies. The feature is already available at Accent, Impact and Talentus. Discover all WorkID partners at [www.workid.be](http://www.workid.be/ "https://workid.be/en/what-is-workid").┬а

**How does it work?┬а**

Thanks to your Doccle account, you already have access to WorkID. You only need to complete your basic details in WorkID. This ensures that your new employer immediately receives all the necessary information to handle your administrative paperwork correctly.


[ More about WorkID](https://doccle.be/en-be/workid/ "More about WorkID")


###Sector in the spotlight


Did you know you can easily connect your Doccle account to many insurance companies? [Ethias](https://doccle.be/en-be/companies/insurance/ethias/) has recently been added.┬а


Depending on your insurer, you can view important documents in your account: receipts, due date notifications, or your green card (international vehicle insurance proof).


Check whether your insurance company is on Doccle. If so, add them and receive and store your documents securely in your Doccle account.


[ Overview of insurance companies](https://doccle.be/en-be/companies-on-doccle/?category=insurance "Overview of insurance companies")


Questions about Doccle?┬а
------------------------


Our Help Center provides clear guidance on everything related to your Doccle account. We continuously update it based on the questions you ask us.┬а

Most consulted articles last month:┬а


- 

[Automatically connect companies to your Doccle account](https://help.doccle.be/hc/en-us/articles/21802433965841-Automatically-connect-companies-to-your-Doccle-account "Automatically connect")


- 

[Pay your invoices in one click thanks to your Doccle wallet](https://help.doccle.be/hc/en-us/articles/30680182411025-Pay-your-invoices-in-one-click-thanks-to-your-Doccle-wallet "Pay your invoices in 1 click")


- 

[How can I add a document to my Doccle account myself?](https://help.doccle.be/hc/en-us/articles/360049656992-How-can-I-add-a-document-to-my-Doccle-account-myself "Add a document")

This is the newsletter for private individuals. Prefer not to receive it?┬а

Simply adjust your preferences via the unsubscribe link at the bottom of this email. Any questions?
